headline: Bristol Myers vs Gilead Sciences: Which Biotech Stock Is a Better Bet Now?
summary: BMY stands out vs GILD, supported by a cheaper valuation, strong growth portfolio, and improving earnings outlook despite generic headwinds.

headline: Lilly’s CAR-T Kelonia deal cements Big Pharma’s in vivo push
summary: The pharma giant’s second CAR-T deal this year, this one worth up to $7 billion, further solidifies what the industry sees as the future of genetic medicines.

summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif., April 21, 2026 - Gilead Sciences, Inc. today published its 2025 Responsible Business and Impact Report, outlining progress toward our 2030 ambitions and the priorities guiding our...
